brands.name: Vercel
brands.aesthetic: Black and white precision with Geist font  -  the definitive developer-tool aesthetic.
brands.palette_hint: Pure black background, pure white text, zero color
brands.typography_hint: Geist or Inter, weight 400-600, tight tracking
brands.best_for: Developer tools, CLIs, deployment platforms, anything that needs to feel serious and fast

brands.name: Raycast
brands.aesthetic: Dark chrome with vibrant gradient accents  -  command-palette UI elevated to luxury.
brands.palette_hint: Deep charcoal base, electric purple-to-pink gradients, subtle frosted glass
brands.typography_hint: SF Pro or Inter, weight 400-500, generous line-height
brands.best_for: Launcher apps, command palettes, productivity tools that live in the OS layer

brands.name: Warp
brands.aesthetic: Modern terminal reimagined with block-based UX and warm dark palette.
brands.palette_hint: Rich near-black background (#1A1A2E range), warm amber and teal highlights
brands.typography_hint: JetBrains Mono or Fira Code, weight 400, relaxed tracking
brands.best_for: Terminal emulators, REPLs, shell-adjacent tooling that wants to feel next-gen

brands.name: Cursor
brands.aesthetic: VS Code skeleton with a cooler, darker palette and AI-first chrome.
brands.palette_hint: Very dark grey backgrounds, muted blue-grey accents, high-contrast selection states
brands.typography_hint: Inter or system-ui, weight 400, compact density
brands.best_for: Code editors, IDE plugins, any tool that embeds inside a coding workflow

brands.name: Supabase
brands.aesthetic: Dark emerald confidence  -  open-source infrastructure that looks enterprise-ready.
brands.palette_hint: Dark grey base, vivid emerald green brand accent, white text
brands.typography_hint: Inter, weight 400-600, standard tracking
brands.best_for: Backend tooling, databases, developer infrastructure with a strong brand identity

brands.name: Linear
brands.aesthetic: Ultra-minimal dark interface with purple accents  -  the gold standard for focused SaaS.
brands.palette_hint: Near-black backgrounds, soft purple primary, muted grey secondary text
brands.typography_hint: Inter, weight 400-500, tight line-height, compact density
brands.best_for: Project management, issue trackers, any SaaS where speed and clarity are the product

brands.name: Stripe
brands.aesthetic: Clean white with deep purple gradient  -  financial precision meets editorial elegance.
brands.palette_hint: White background, indigo-to-purple gradient brand, slate grey text
brands.typography_hint: Sohne or Inter, weight 300-400, generous white space
brands.best_for: Payments, billing dashboards, financial SaaS where trust and legibility are critical

brands.name: Notion
brands.aesthetic: Warm off-white minimalism with a hint of serif  -  calm productivity for knowledge workers.
brands.palette_hint: Off-white background, near-black text, warm grey accents, no strong brand color
brands.typography_hint: ui-sans-serif stack, with option for Georgia/Charter serif in content areas
brands.best_for: CMS, wikis, note-taking apps, workspaces where long-form content is front and center

brands.name: Superhuman
brands.aesthetic: Dark premium email UI  -  obsessively keyboard-first with cinematic dark mode.
brands.palette_hint: Deep dark backgrounds, bright white primary text, orange-red call-to-action accents
brands.typography_hint: Inter, weight 400, highly optimised for reading-at-a-glance density
brands.best_for: High-frequency workflow tools, email clients, inboxes where every millisecond is designed

brands.name: PostHog
brands.aesthetic: Bold analytics with dark hedgehog energy  -  data-rich and unapologetically product-led.
brands.palette_hint: Dark backgrounds with lime/yellow-green accents, vivid chart colours
brands.typography_hint: Matter or Inter, weight 400-600, slightly loose tracking
brands.best_for: Analytics dashboards, product telemetry UIs, developer-facing data tools

brands.name: Claude

brands.palette_hint: Warm off-white backgrounds, terracotta and sand accent tones, rich dark text
brands.typography_hint: Styrene or similar humanist sans, weight 400, generous line-height

brands.name: Cohere

brands.typography_hint: Inter or Neue Haas Grotesk, weight 400-500, standard tracking

brands.name: ElevenLabs

brands.typography_hint: Inter, weight 400-700 mixed, tight heading tracking
brands.best_for: Audio AI, voice synthesis, media generation tools where drama and quality must be felt

brands.name: Mistral

brands.name: ClickHouse

brands.name: Supabase
brands.aesthetic: Dark emerald open-source infrastructure  -  backend-as-a-service with developer-first warmth.

brands.typography_hint: Inter, weight 400-600, standard tracking
brands.best_for: BaaS products, database consoles, any backend tool that open-source developers will love

brands.name: Stripe

brands.typography_hint: Sohne or Inter, weight 300-400, wide margins, refined spacing

brands.name: Revolut

brands.name: Wise

brands.typography_hint: Inter or system-ui, weight 400-600, clear hierarchy

brands.name: Coinbase

brands.name: Notion

brands.name: Substack

brands.name: Sanity
brands.aesthetic: Red accent content-first studio  -  editor tooling that is itself beautifully designed.

brands.typography_hint: Inter, weight 400-600, tight content editor density

brands.name: The Verge

brands.typography_hint: Large display type with strong weight contrast, editorial serif headline option

brands.name: RunwayML

brands.name: Spotify

brands.name: Apple
